notes: Owner noted Madoff is an over-covered story and asked for a deliberately different angle and thumbnail to protect retention and shareability, then delegated the choice to Claude ('君のおすすめで', 2026-06-19). Approved angle (topic v002, supersedes v001): protagonist = the impossibly perfect never-down return chart as the smoking gun ('too steady = red flag', a usable viewer takeaway); human spine = the whistleblower ignored by the SEC for ~9 years; myth-correction payoff on the $65B (fabricated value vs ~$17.5B principal). Visual identity faceless dark/gold noir, NO pink. Differentiation score raised 8->9; total 85->89. Proceed to research on v002.
conditions: Visual identity stays symbolic/faceless; hero motif = the perfect return curve; NO pink (invariant 11).
